text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is the perfect opportunity for
Symboli Rudolf and I to sharpen up for the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ideally, we should be taking this opportunity to
focus all our efforts on our own training, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Looking good, everybody! Once you've caught
your breath, we'll try a 200-meter dash.

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, President!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hello, Trainer. I was just helping these fine
students with their training.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
They have not yet been assigned their own
trainers, so I thought I might lend my assistance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True enough, Symboli Rudolf could probably give
as good a lesson as the average trainer, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You're wondering whether I'm neglecting my own
training, aren't you? It's written on your face.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not to worry, I fully intend to adhere to our
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have calculated everything to perfection. I've
even incorporated a buffer in case of
emergencies.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do you have any other questions?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Splendid. Now, I think that's a long enough break.
I ought to get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A little while after we finish our session, I catch
sight of Symboli Rudolf once again leading a class
of younger students.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon tells me that you are frustrated by
your performance in the scrimmages. Is that
correct?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Th-that's right...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've been getting great times during practice. If
I'd been able to match them in the last
scrimmage, I would've won...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: In that case, your issue sounds quite clear.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You think so?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's exceedingly rare to replicate one's practice
times in a real race.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The only way to close that gap is by acclimating
yourself to the race environment. What you lack
is experience.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have a suggestion to help you better
understand.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
How would you like to run with me, here and
now?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin and Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I... I'd love to!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. I'm glad to hear it. Shall we get started?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after nighttime rolls around and most of the
students are enjoying leisure time, there's no rest
for the weary.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Sorry for taking up so much of your time, Prez.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Think nothing of it. Any concern of the academy's
is a concern of mine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am simply glad to help my fellow students. Had I
been denied that opportunity, I would've been
devastated.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, you certainly never change, do you?
Anyway, I ought to skedaddle.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure some darling ponies are overworking
themselves somewhere, and I have to go find
them!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've seen for myself that Symboli Rudolf
is managing her schedule just fine, there's no
reason to be concerned... but I can't quite shake a
nagging unease.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I realize this is sudden, but may I ask your
thoughts on something?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Very good. I was trying to brainstorm some ways
to get the most out of summer camp, you see...
choice_data_list: You mean on top of our regular training?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Precisely. Bonus training, if you will.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Over the past few days, it has become clear to me
that I have more to learn if I wish to conquer the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Can you think of anything we could add to our
current schedule?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her commitment is impressive, but I can't
recommend taking on any more physical training.
Instead I suggest...
choice_data_list: Take a break now and then.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That... wasn't exactly what I had in mind. Perhaps
I was a little too roundabout...
choice_data_list: Diet matters as much as practice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am aware. But that isn't why you're suggesting
this, is it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You think more exertion would do more harm
than good, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You think too little of me. You and Air Groove
both.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have told you both of the dream I aspire to. You
know that attaining it will require extraordinary
effort.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The path I have chosen requires me to push
myself beyond my limits. I thought you
understood that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do you truly think I am so weak as to falter at this
hurdle?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. That was thoughtless of me. You are
not the target of my frustrations.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, I must become stronger if I don't want
others to worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Leave me be for now, Trainer. Let me ponder this
alone first.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For now, I will take your advice. I'll be sure to
have a hearty meal tonight.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for the trouble. Please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her walk away, her lonely figure stolidly
refusing any encouragement or comfort...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And I can't even open my mouth to stop her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
That... wasn't exactly what I had in mind. Perhaps
I was a little too roundabout...
choice_data_list: Rest matters as much as practice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am aware. But that isn't why you're suggesting
this, is it?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You think more exertion would do more harm
than good, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You think too little of me. You and Air Groove
both.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I have told you both of the dream I aspire to. You
know that attaining it will require extraordinary
effort.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
The path I have chosen requires me to push
myself beyond my limits. I thought you
understood that.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Do you truly think I am so weak as to falter at this
hurdle?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. That was thoughtless of me. You are
not the target of my frustrations.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Clearly, I must become stronger if I don't want
others to worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Leave me be for now, Trainer. Let me ponder this
alone first.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
For now, I will take your advice. I will rest and
recover, even if I must be forced to.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry for the trouble. Please excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch her walk away, her lonely figure stolidly
refusing any encouragement or comfort...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And I can't even open my mouth to stop her.
